name: Arrival pacing board
description: Live board for reservation waves, walk-ins, seat release timing, and front-door pacing decisions.
source_ref: core-v2: intake shaping needs a shared live surface, not private judgment
usage_moment: Use during service to track arrival pressure and seat release decisions in real time.
expected_output: A current front-door view of waves, waits, release logic, and emerging pacing risk.
